name: Can I get workers comp if exposure was just one day at work?
description: Yes, prove medical link from incident.

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if exposure was just one day at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, prove medical link from incident.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, single incidents qualify if causing injury/illness.**

Covers acute exposures like fumes; prove link[3][2]. No minimum time required.

- ER records immediate.
- Witness incident.
- MSDS for substance.

File promptly; viable even brief. Doctor ties to event[3].
